best_in_class_gaps.gap: atomic-tokenizer bus surface is now registered but still only smoke-tests byte bijection
best_in_class_gaps.impact: patent-ready atomic tokenizer needs a stronger task corpus covering semantic atoms, code slots, and transport packets

best_in_class_gaps.gap: cross-build is Tier 1 lexicon-bounded, not arbitrary AST translation
best_in_class_gaps.impact: 64 ops close cleanly, but best-in-class cross-domain compiler needs Tier 2 parser-backed lift into same LatticeOp schema

best_in_class_gaps.gap: semantic hex recomposition is nearest-atom, not lossless semantic identity
best_in_class_gaps.impact: good for routing/interpolation, but benchmark should not claim perfect natural-language bijection

best_in_class_gaps.gap: YouTube upload lane is registered but intentionally unlisted-first
best_in_class_gaps.impact: public publish remains a human approval gate; benchmark validates route availability, not live upload success
